Care plan03-Jun-2010-
Dialysis care plan09-Mar-2006-
Diabetes self management plan08-Dec-1997Prediabetes
  • Patient will implement and maintain a diabetes self-management plan including dietary changes, physical activity, and regular blood glucose monitoring to prevent progression to type 2 diabetes.
  • Maintain hemoglobin A1c below 5.7% to reduce risk of progression to diabetes.
  • Maintain fasting blood glucose less than 100 mg/dL.
  • Achieve at least 5% reduction in body weight to improve insulin sensitivity and metabolic health.
Lifestyle education regarding hypertension17-Jul-1972Essential hypertension (disorder)
  • Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg through lifestyle modifications.
  • Limit daily sodium intake to less than 2.3 grams to support blood pressure control.
  • Achieve a 5% reduction in body weight to improve blood pressure control.
  • Engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity aerobic physical activity per week.
Immunization RecommendationDue DateReason
